final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial news photo for a Weibo hot-topic banner.

Style/medium: documentary photography, photojournalistic, smartphone-like capture
Composition: 16:9 wide banner, horizontal orientation, generous negative space for text overlay
Subject: city skyline at dusk, pedestrians in motion, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset
Scene/backdrop: urban cityscape at twilight, neon lights beginning to glow, sunset reflections on high-rise buildings
Lighting/mood: dramatic light and shadow contrast, golden hour transitioning to night, neon glow
Color palette: warm sunset tones, cool neon accents
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: photorealistic, authentic on-scene feel, sharp details
Avoid:
